description: [UNVERIFIED — authored from official API docs; test with your API key before signing] Notion API via an internal integration token — search, read pages and databases, query databases, and create content. Every request also sends the required 'Notion-Version' header. Share the pages/databases you want to access with your integration first.

credentialFields.name: integrationToken
credentialFields.label: Internal Integration Token
credentialFields.description: Create an internal integration at https://www.notion.com/my-integrations and copy its token. Then share each page/database with the integration (Share menu) so it can be accessed. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.

tools.name: notion_search
tools.description: Search pages and databases shared with the integration by title. Omit 'query' in the body to list everything the integration can access.

params.name: Notion-Version
params.description: Required Notion API version header. Sent on every request.

tools.name: notion_get_page
tools.description: Retrieve a page's properties by page id. Returns property values, not the page body — use notion_get_block_children for the content blocks.

params.name: page_id
params.description: Page id (the 32-char id from the page URL, with or without dashes).

params.name: Notion-Version
params.description: Required Notion API version header. Sent on every request.

tools.name: notion_get_block_children
tools.description: Get the child blocks (the actual content) of a page or block. Pass a page id to read a page's body.

params.name: start_cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's next_cursor.

params.name: Notion-Version
params.description: Required Notion API version header. Sent on every request.

tools.name: notion_get_database
tools.description: Retrieve a database's metadata and schema (its properties/columns) by database id.

params.name: database_id
params.description: Database id (the 32-char id from the database URL).

params.name: Notion-Version
params.description: Required Notion API version header. Sent on every request.

tools.name: notion_query_database
tools.description: Query a database's rows (pages) with optional filter and sorts.

params.name: Notion-Version
params.description: Required Notion API version header. Sent on every request.

params.name: body
params.description: { "filter"?: object, "sorts"?: array, "page_size"?: number, "start_cursor"?: string } — see Notion 'Query a database' docs for filter syntax.

tools.name: notion_list_users
tools.description: List all users in the workspace (members and bots).

params.name: start_cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's next_cursor.

params.name: Notion-Version
params.description: Required Notion API version header. Sent on every request.

tools.name: notion_create_page
tools.description: Create a new page, either as a child of a page (parent.page_id) or a row in a database (parent.database_id with matching properties).

params.name: Notion-Version
params.description: Required Notion API version header. Sent on every request.

params.name: body
params.description: { "parent": { "page_id": string } | { "database_id": string }, "properties": object, "children"?: array of block objects }

tools.name: notion_append_block_children
tools.description: Append content blocks to a page or block.

params.name: block_id
params.description: Block or page id to append children to.

params.name: Notion-Version
params.description: Required Notion API version header. Sent on every request.
